name: pure-cognitive-oil
description: Graph-connected cognitive infrastructure and verification framework for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Graph-connected cognitive routing and verification for agents
interface.longDescription: Use PCO to load a machine-readable cognitive graph, route work through reasoning engines and workflows, and verify outputs through quality-safety gates.
defaultPrompt: Use PCO to reason through this task.
Apply PCO verification gates to this project.
Run pco agentic-auto "<task>" before complex autonomous implementation.
